title: 6 Pcs Elastic Fidget Noodles, Stretchy Finger Stress Relief Toys, 25cm (9.8cm), Vibrant String Toy for Kids and Adults, DIY Hand-Knit Rope Anti Stress, ADHD, Autism Sensory Toy (6 Multicoloured Bands)
features: ❤️ 💛 💙 SQUEEZY STRETCHY NOODLES! -These stretchy fidget noodles are sure to put a smile on your littles one's face, made of 100% high quality TPR material which is BPA free; soft, durable, colourful and comfortable to touch. Knot them, squeeze them and stretch them!

❤️ 💛 💙 EASY TO USE AND FUN TO PLAY - Stress and anxiety reduction tools are great for people of all ages. Each noodle measures 25cm x 0.5cm (9.8” x 0.19”)and You can stretch and pull them to over 6 feet and you can wrap them around your hands and fingers in the air

❤️ 💛 💙 ENDLESS FUN FOR ALL AGES - In six vibrant colours: Yellow, orange, purple, green, blue and pink. Our stretchy string is great for relieving your stress and anxiety by squeezing them and watching them back to their original shape. Not recommended for kids under 3 years of age
❤️ 💛 💙 WIDE APPLICATION - Our stretchy string is perfect for the classroom, home or office and they're also great for parents, teachers, students, therapists and anyone else

Feel the satisfying elasticity as the noodles return to their original shape, providing endless fidgeting fun. These stress reliever toys come in an array of vibrant colours, adding a visually stimulating element to your sensory experience. Whether you're dealing with stress or anxiety this fidget toy bundle offers a calming solution. Keep them in your pocket, desk, or bag for on-the-go stress relief whenever you need it. These stretchy fidget toys are designed for everyone. From restless kids to adults seeking a moment of relaxation. Their versatility makes them an ideal tool for managing stress and promoting focus. Fantastic Fidget Noodles! Discover the ultimate stress relief companion with this fidget noodles set – the ideal tactile solution for both kids and adults! Measuring 25cm in length these stretchy finger stress relief toys provide a delightful sensory experience that will keep your fingers busy and your mind at ease. Coming in six different bright and vibrant colours these stretchy string noodles are designed to bring a smile to anyone who plays with them!
